script_data.shahbaz_msg_1: trump bhai biryani competition mein part lene ka kya khayal hai?
script_data.trump_msg_1: jani, biryani toh zindagi hai, lekin meri plate hamesha neemgaram rehti hai!
script_data.shahbaz_msg_2: no tension, Karachi Biryani Centre ka masla hai, biryani garam aur dil se serve hoti hai! 😂
script_data.tagline: Biryani ka asli maza, sirf yahan!
